title: goodenia armstrongiana
intro: Goodenia armstrongiana, also known as Armstrong's goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the Goodeniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used by the indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and fever. The health benefits of Goodenia armstrongiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
